title: Sasaella longipes
taxonomy: Sasaella longipes belongs to the family Poaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. It is a type of bamboo, specifically a species of clumping bamboo. Within the Poaceae family, Sasaella longipes is classified under the subfamily Bambusoideae. This subfamily is further divided into several tribes, with Sasaella longipes being part of the tribe Arundinarieae. The exact classification of Sasaella longipes can be further refined with more specific information on its taxonomy.
